summary.business_type: B2B Digital Marketing / Lead Generation Agency (professional service)
summary.scope: Site-wide SEO + redesigned homepage on branch homepage-redesign (not yet deployed)
top_findings: Broken import in the redesign: Timeline.tsx imports the deleted OnboardingModels3D; new OnboardingSteps.tsx unwired (build throws Module not found)
NAP location conflict: Cambridge, MA schema vs New York, NY JobPosting/careers copy
<main> landmark wraps only the hero; all other homepage sections are siblings outside it
Split-brand: llms.txt/manifest/markdown-mirror still say 'Guaranteed Leads' vs site 'Risk-Averse Lead Engine'
quick_wins: Reconcile founding year and HQ location across llms.txt, manifest, schema
Promote 'Scale Your Business' and footer CTA from span/div to <h2>
summary.not_covered: Field CWV (CrUX), GSC indexation, GA4 organic traffic, backlink profile, live SERP positions — no API credentials configured

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: HTTPS enforced with HSTS; CSP, X-Content-Type-Options nosniff, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy present
www->non-www and http->https 301 redirects verified live
robots.txt disallows app/auth paths, allows blog+RSS, explicitly allows AI crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, OAI-SearchBot, Google-Extended)
Dynamic sitemap with ISR (revalidate 3600), test-slug filtering, correct noindex-tag exclusion; 30 URLs live
AVIF/WebP image pipeline; poweredByHeader disabled; Cloudflare CDN

findings.title: Broken dynamic import in redesign
findings.description: Timeline.tsx:12,108,198 import deleted ./OnboardingModels3D; replacement OnboardingSteps.tsx unwired. SSR survives (ssr:false + loading fallback) but client visual broken and dev build errors.
findings.recommendation: Rewire Timeline to the new step component before merge

findings.title: SearchAction endpoint non-functional
findings.description: app/layout.tsx:215 targets /blog?search= but pages/blog.tsx never reads the query param.
findings.recommendation: Hydrate blog search from URL, or remove the SearchAction

findings.title: X-Frame-Options header absent
findings.description: Only CSP frame-ancestors 'self' guards clickjacking.

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: Deep legal/policy pages (18-24 sections each) with clean H1/H2 hierarchy
Blog posts carry real E-E-A-T: author byline+link, published/modified dates, sameAs profiles
Careers content deep (10 roles with full detail)
Homepage 1,287 crawlable words + sr-only 'About Vierra' summary

findings.title: Split-brand: Guaranteed Leads vs Risk-Averse Lead Engine
findings.description: llms.txt, manifest.json, content/md/index.md still say 'Guaranteed Leads'; site says 'Risk-Averse Lead Engine'. Legally loaded claim; AI engines cite the stale files.
findings.recommendation: Migrate AI/PWA files to current positioning; drop 'guaranteed'

findings.title: Blog author pages indexable but thin
findings.description: pages/blog/author/[name].tsx: card grid only, ~44-char templated description, no bio/photo/credentials.

findings.title: Homepage 'Coming Soon' case-studies placeholder
findings.description: components/WorkSection/CaseStudies.tsx:20-64 is a thin placeholder under a keyword-named heading.

findings.title: Client-rotated sections expose one variant in SSR
findings.description: BusinessSolutions shows only active tab; testimonials/stats rotate via setInterval.
findings.recommendation: Render all variants in DOM, toggle via CSS

findings.title: FAQ only 9 items
findings.description: lib/faq.ts

categories.name: On-Page SEO
what_works: Homepage: 50-char title, unique description, canonical, robots, OG, Twitter, exactly one H1
Unique dynamic titles/descriptions/canonicals across templates
Blog post OG uses og:type=article with published/modified/author/tags

findings.title: <main> wraps only the hero
findings.description: app/page.tsx:126-199 vs sections at :289-321 outside <main>.
findings.recommendation: Wrap all primary content in one <main>

findings.title: Duplicate id='cases'
findings.description: CaseStudies.tsx:12 and Testimonials.tsx:144 — invalid HTML, breaks anchor scroll.

findings.title: Prominent visual headings not marked up
findings.description: StatsGrid.tsx:150 'Scale Your Business' is a span; MainComponent.tsx:88 footer CTA is a div.

findings.title: Short/generic titles
findings.description: /blog 13 chars, /careers 16, /branding 18.

findings.title: Missing OG/Twitter images on legal + branding pages
findings.description: privacy-policy, terms-of-service, work-policy, branding have no image tags.
findings.recommendation: Add shared meta-banner.png; upgrade branding to summary_large_image

findings.title: Heading skip H1->H3 on author/tag pages
findings.description: author/[name].tsx:145,177; tag/[tag].tsx:141,173.

findings.title: Homepage meta description ~164 chars + variant mismatch
findings.description: app/layout.tsx:23-24 vs OG/Twitter :58,77.

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: Site-wide Organization, WebSite (+SearchAction), ProfessionalService/LocalBusiness
BlogPosting + BreadcrumbList, Blog listing, CollectionPage (author/tag), FAQPage, careers ItemList + Breadcrumb
Best-in-class JobPosting: validThrough, employmentType enum, baseSalary MonetaryAmount, directApply

findings.title: NAP conflict: MA entity vs NYC JobPosting
findings.description: app/layout.tsx:169-175 (Cambridge MA) vs pages/careers/[slug].tsx:124-132 (New York NY).
findings.recommendation: Reconcile HQ; add NYC as distinct location or fix job location

findings.title: foundingDate 2019 vs 2024
findings.description: app/layout.tsx:190,261 vs llms.txt:16.

findings.title: Blog-listing publisher.logo uses social banner
findings.description: pages/blog.tsx:238-241 uses meta-banner.png (1200x630) with no dimensions.

findings.title: Homepage has no page-level schema
findings.description: app/page.tsx inherits site-wide only.

findings.title: Author pages use CollectionPage not ProfilePage
findings.description: pages/blog/author/[name].tsx:70-119.

findings.title: LocalBusiness type risks local-pack mismatch
findings.description: National B2B agency modeled as LocalBusiness with storefront signals.

categories.name: Performance (CWV)
what_works: WebGL code-split via dynamic ssr:false; three.js out of initial bundle
Reduced-motion respected across animated components
Onboarding refactor replaces WebGL step-models with lighter DOM/SVG animations
AVIF/WebP; preconnect/dns-prefetch hints; hero H1 paints without opacity fade to protect LCP

findings.title: Entire homepage is 'use client'
findings.description: app/page.tsx:1 — whole tree hydrates, inflating JS/INP around LCP.
findings.recommendation: Keep page a Server Component; push 'use client' to interactive leaves

findings.title: Pervasive opacity:0-until-animated pattern
findings.description: whileInView/initial=hidden across sections; hydration failure or no-JS yields blank page.

findings.title: No measured LCP/INP/CLS
findings.description: No field or lab data captured.
findings.recommendation: Run Lighthouse + pull CrUX after deploy; validate mobile INP

findings.title: Broken Timeline import may throw client-side
findings.description: Until fixed, can degrade UX/CWV.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness (GEO)
what_works: llms.txt present with org/services/contact/sitemap/crawl guidance
AI crawlers explicitly allowed in robots.txt
FAQPage schema + <details> keep answers in DOM (highly citable)
Markdown mirror (content/md via /api/md) gives clean LLM text
sr-only 'About Vierra' summary is a quotable definition

findings.title: llms.txt stale and off-message
findings.description: public/llms.txt:6,16,29 — 'Guaranteed Leads', 'Founded: 2024'. This is the file AI engines cite.
findings.recommendation: Update to match site positioning and correct facts

findings.title: Client-rotated homepage content not fully in DOM
findings.description: Channel tabs, testimonials, stats rotate via JS.
findings.recommendation: Render all variants for full AI snapshot

findings.title: Thin case-studies block reduces citable proof
findings.description: CaseStudies.tsx:20-64 'Coming Soon'.

categories.name: Images
what_works: All 30 homepage images carry alt (0 missing); decorative correctly alt='' aria-hidden
WebGL BrandSphere given role='img' aria-label text alternative
AVIF/WebP via Next Image; qualities:[80] declared

findings.title: Per-post/page OG images all generic banner
findings.description: pages/blog/[slug].tsx:150.

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Improvements
items: Resolve NAP location conflict (MA vs NYC)
Render all client-rotated variants in DOM
Replace 'Coming Soon' case-studies with real results

phases.name: Phase 3: Content & Authority
items: Refactor homepage to Server Component + client leaves
